creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, this is not a bug. 7.0 is no longer supported, you should try and 
download 7.2 which is available at all major ftp servers. I did an 7.2 
installation under VMware just a few days ago which worked fine. Please 
test this and report to me if this does not work, together we will try 
to resolve it then. Thanks for making FreeBSD better!
